# Releases
## llm-rules@0.2.8

### Patch Changes

-   0e3fe34: fix: require at least 10 characters in Cursor rule descriptions
Makes this work with Remix projects: https://github.com/Josh-test-org-123/remix-demo/pull/6/files

- Added ESLint 9 support with unstable_config_lookup_from_file flag

Fixed process customers sell rate

TODO: Complete ESLint 9 migration - fix config issues and auto-fix warnings

TODO: Step 6 - Update all package configurations

- Replaced all .eslintrc.cjs files with eslint.config.ts using default config
- Updated all package.json scripts from run-eslint-workers to run-eslint
- Updated packages: cli-tools, dagger-helpers, workers-tagged-logger-test, typeid, workers-tagged-logger, otel-cf-workers, http-codex, tools
- Updated examples: otel-example, cli-example, hono-app, vanilla-worker
feat: migrate Pages projects with a functions/ directory

chore: don't check types in dependencies in turbo.jsonc

needlessly slows things down and I'm unsure if it's really needed

TODO: Step 5 - Update Turbo configuration

- Renamed turbo.json to turbo.jsonc
- Updated check:lint task with new dependencies and env
- Added //#check:lint:all task
- Updated check:ci to use //#check:lint:all
Version Packages
fixed inventory maxing out

- Updated package.json with new exports and ESLint 9 dependencies
- Created new src/ directory structure with TypeScript configs
- Added helpers.ts, default.config.ts, react.config.ts
- Deleted old .cjs files
formatting
